layman_headline: The crypto market is fearful and most coins are in downtrends — patience is the play right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is sitting in 'Fear' territory at 28/100, with Bitcoin dominance high at 56.5%, meaning money is flowing away from smaller coins into Bitcoin. Every single swing trade candidate has bearish chart structure — prices are below their key moving averages. While a few coins like TRUMP and BONK are deeply oversold, their charts show active selling pressure with no signs of reversal yet. Catching a falling knife here would be risky.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines and keep your cash ready. Wait for clearer reversal signals — a bounce off support with rising volume, or a shift in market fear toward neutral. Ethereum near $1,800 could become a compelling entry if it holds that support level.
expert_reasoning: No candidate presents a high-conviction swing entry right now. All charts show bearish structure with prices below key moving averages. TRUMP has the most oversold RSI at 22 (which historically is a reliable signal per our credibility data), but its chart bias is -0.70 with tight R/R of 1.0x and the coin has lost 97.8% from ATH — this is a falling knife. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with a Three White Soldiers pattern, but RSI at 59 after a 14% weekly run and a terrible R/R ratio of 0.38x means the easy money has been made. ETH is the best risk-adjusted opportunity IF it pulls back to $1,800 support — the 5-day momentum turning positive while price is still near oversold is the early sign of a potential bottom, but confirmation is needed. With Fear & Greed at 28 and BTC dominance at 56.5%, alts remain under pressure and rushing in here has negative expected value.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.5% continues to crush altcoin performance — any BTC weakness could drag everything lower
Fear & Greed at 28 with a flat trend shows no sign of sentiment recovery — could deteriorate further
All candidates are below their 20-day SMAs with bearish chart structure — no confirmed reversals yet
watch_list: ETH price action around $1,800 support — a bounce with volume confirmation would trigger a BUY
Fear & Greed index — a move above 35 would signal improving conditions for alt entries
TRUMP RSI at 22 — if it starts curling up with a bullish candle pattern, could be a quick oversold bounce play
market_context: The crypto market is in a fearful state with BTC dominance elevated at 56.5%, creating a hostile environment for altcoin swing trades. BTC itself is flat near $64,500 while regulatory uncertainty around stablecoins (GENIUS Act deadlines missed) adds macro headwinds.
context_banner: All swing candidates show bearish chart structure in a fear-driven market — disciplined traders wait for confirmed reversals rather than catching falling knives.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 28 ('Fear') with flat trend suggests no imminent sentiment recovery — historically a mixed signal requiring confirmation from technicals.
TRUMP RSI at 22 is deeply oversold (our most reliable signal at 80% win rate), but chart bias of -0.70 and 1.0x R/R make it too risky without a reversal candle.
US agencies missing GENIUS Act stablecoin deadline creates regulatory uncertainty that dampens risk appetite across crypto markets.
ETH derivatives reset article suggests positioning is clearing out, which could set up a cleaner move once directional conviction returns.
LDO's Three White Soldiers is the only bullish chart pattern across all candidates, but poor R/R of 0.38x after a 51.7% 5-day run makes chasing it inadvisable.
